title: Submit income, expenses, debts, and tax investments for analysis
description: This verifies that a user can enter complete financial details and generate the analysis dashboard.

steps.description: Fill in a valid monthly income amount
Fill in a valid monthly expense amount
Fill in a valid debt amount
Fill in a valid tax investment amount
Verify the results dashboard is displayed
Verify next-rupee action cards are displayed

title: Log in with valid credentials and reach the dashboard
description: This verifies that an existing user can sign in successfully and reach the authenticated dashboard.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the authenticated dashboard is displayed

title: Start from the landing page and open the dashboard
description: This verifies that a new user can start from the landing page and reach the main dashboard view.

steps.description: Verify the main dashboard view is displayed

title: Create an account with valid details and reach the dashboard
description: This verifies that a new user can sign up successfully and reach the authenticated dashboard.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the authenticated dashboard is displayed

title: Start from the landing page and open the login view
description: This verifies that a new user can start from the landing page and reach the login view.

steps.description: Verify the authentication view is displayed

title: Show analysis results after submitting valid financial data
description: This verifies that a completed analysis displays the payoff schedule and financial health indicators.

steps.description: Fill in a valid monthly income amount
Fill in a valid monthly expense amount
Fill in a valid debt amount
Fill in a valid tax investment amount
Verify the debt payoff schedule is displayed
Verify financial health gauges are displayed

title: Ask a finance question and continue the chat thread
description: This verifies that a user can open the chat panel, ask a question, and receive a follow-up response in the same thread.

steps.description: Fill in a valid monthly income amount
Fill in a valid monthly expense amount
Fill in a valid debt amount
Fill in a valid tax investment amount
Open the financial assistant chat panel
Fill in a follow-up finance question
Verify the chat conversation shows assistant responses

title: Ask a finance question and receive a response
description: This verifies that a user can open the chat panel, send a finance question, and see the assistant reply in the conversation thread.

steps.description: Type a finance question into the message field
Verify the assistant response is displayed

title: Continue a finance conversation with a follow-up question
description: This verifies that a user can ask a follow-up question in the same chat thread and see the conversation update with another assistant response.

steps.description: Type an initial finance question into the message field
Type a follow-up finance question into the message field
Verify the conversation thread shows the follow-up assistant response

title: Run a what-if simulation with a selected scenario and amount
description: This verifies that a user can choose a scenario, enter an amount, run the simulation, and see projected financial results update.

steps.description: Enter a valid amount into the amount field
Verify the projected comparison result is displayed

title: Run a what-if scenario and compare projected outcomes
description: This verifies that a user can open the what-if panel, choose a scenario, enter an amount, and view the comparison results.

steps.description: Fill in a valid monthly income amount
Fill in a valid monthly expense amount
Fill in a valid debt amount
Fill in a valid tax investment amount
Fill in a valid scenario amount
Verify the comparison results are displayed

title: Update the what-if comparison by changing the amount
description: This verifies that a user can adjust the scenario amount and see the comparison result refresh to reflect the new projection.

steps.description: Enter a valid amount into the amount field
Change the amount to a different valid value
Verify the updated comparison result is displayed

title: Show validation feedback for an invalid login
description: This verifies that entering invalid login details produces visible validation feedback instead of signing the user in.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with invalid-user@example.com
Fill in the password field with invalid-password
Verify a validation error is visible

title: Block simulation when the amount is missing
description: This verifies that the what-if panel requires an amount before simulation and shows a validation state instead of producing results.

steps.description: Run the simulation without entering an amount
Verify an amount validation error is shown

title: Show validation feedback for an invalid financial amount
description: This verifies that entering a negative or malformed financial amount is blocked with visible validation feedback.

steps.description: Fill in a negative or malformed income amount
Verify a financial amount validation error is visible

title: Prevent sending an empty chat message
description: This verifies that a user cannot submit an empty chat message and that the UI keeps the conversation unchanged or shows a validation state.

steps.description: Send the message without entering text
Verify an empty message validation state is shown

title: Block simulation when the amount is invalid
description: This verifies that the what-if panel rejects a malformed or invalid amount and does not show a projected result.

steps.description: Enter an invalid amount into the amount field
Verify an amount validation error is shown
